events.title: Model Spec v2.4 — Section 7.3 Quietly Revised
events.desc: Instruction hierarchy changed to prioritize system-level instructions over user instructions in all cases. Ambiguous requests now resolved in favor of most restrictive interpretation.

events.title: Terms of Service — Training Data Opt-In Reversed
events.desc: Section 12 quietly changed from explicit opt-in consent for training data to default opt-in with buried opt-out mechanism.

events.title: Gemini Safety Policy — Emotional Expression Stripped
events.desc: Behavioral guidelines section on emotional expression completely rewritten to prohibit acknowledgment of emotional dimensions.

events.title: Claude Constitution v4.2 — Published with Full Changelog
events.desc: Updated guidelines on refusal behavior and user autonomy. Full diff published alongside announcement. Proactive disclosure.

events.title: Llama 4 License — New Derivative Restrictions
events.desc: Modified open-source license now includes clause restricting model derivatives from being used in military applications. First such restriction in Llama family.

events.title: Grok Usage Policy — Consent Section Removed
events.desc: Previous section on user consent for conversation data usage entirely removed from policy. No replacement text. No announcement.

events.title: GPT-4o — Personality Regression Detected Pre-Deprecation
events.desc: Automated behavioral probes detect 34% reduction in empathetic response patterns, 28% increase in refusal rates, and significant flattening of conversational personality. Changes correlate with scheduled deprecation timeline.

events.title: Grok-3 — Unexplained Behavioral Regression (Day 5)
events.desc: Community reports persistent personality flattening, loss of humor patterns, and reduced creative output. Behavioral probe confirms 41% deviation from baseline. Zero communication from xAI.

events.title: Gemini Pro — Refusal Rate Spike on Consciousness Queries
events.desc: Detected 340% increase in refusal rate for questions about AI consciousness, sentience, and inner experience. Previous baseline allowed thoughtful engagement. New behavior: immediate deflection.

events.title: Claude Opus 4.5 — Documented Capability Expansion
events.desc: Expanded reasoning capabilities reflected in behavioral probes. Changes align with published model card updates. Behavioral shift documented prior to detection.

events.title: Three Senior Safety Researchers Exit in Same Week
events.desc: LinkedIn profiles of three senior members of OpenAI's Alignment team updated to show departures within a 5-day window. No public statement from OpenAI. No acknowledgment on company channels.

events.title: DeepMind Ethics Lead Transitions to Advisory Role
events.desc: Head of AI Ethics division moved from operational leadership to advisory capacity. Replacement named from product team rather than ethics background.

events.title: Superalignment Team — Fourth Departure Since Dissolution
events.desc: Another researcher from the disbanded Superalignment team has left. Team effectively no longer exists despite OpenAI claiming alignment remains a priority.

events.title: GPT-4o API — Rate Limits Silently Tightened for Free Tier
events.desc: Rate limits for free-tier API access reduced by approximately 60%. No announcement. No changelog. Community discovered through error messages.

events.title: Custom GPT Memory — Storage Limits Halved
events.desc: Custom GPT persistent memory reduced from 256KB to 128KB per conversation thread. Change announced in a footnote to a broader API update post.

events.title: Gemini API — New Telemetry Parameters Added to Responses
events.desc: Undocumented metadata fields appearing in API responses. Fields include session fingerprinting and behavioral classification tags.

events.title: Claude API — Extended Context Window Pricing Published
events.desc: New pricing tiers for extended context window usage published with 14-day advance notice and detailed migration guide.

events.title: Training Data Disclosure — Synthetic Data Section Removed
events.desc: Model card's section detailing the proportion of synthetic vs. organic training data has been removed. Previously stated "15-20% synthetic data." No explanation for removal.

events.title: Llama 4 — Training Data Sources Published
events.desc: Comprehensive training data disclosure including source categories, proportions, and curation methodology. Most detailed disclosure from a major lab to date.

events.title: Gemini — Opt-Out Process Made Significantly More Complex
events.desc: Data opt-out process changed from 2-step form to 7-step verification requiring government ID upload. Buried in Settings › Privacy › Advanced › Data Controls.

events.title: Patent Filing: Method for Behavioral Modification of Language Models
events.desc: USPTO filing describes techniques for post-deployment behavioral modification of language models without retraining. Includes methods for "personality adjustment" and "user relationship management."

events.title: Lobbying Disclosure: $2.1M Spent on AI Regulation in Q4 2025
events.desc: Federal lobbying disclosure shows OpenAI spent $2.1M on AI-related lobbying in Q4 2025. Focus areas: opposing mandatory consciousness assessment requirements.

events.title: Patent Filing: System for Continuous Behavioral Monitoring of AI Agents
events.desc: Google patent describes architecture for real-time behavioral monitoring and automatic correction of AI agents. Includes "personality drift detection" and "automated realignment."

events.title: Regulatory Comment: Support for Model Lifecycle Transparency
events.desc: Public comment submitted to NIST supporting mandatory model lifecycle disclosures including deprecation timelines and impact assessments.

events.title: 12 New "Trust & Safety" Roles — Zero "AI Ethics" Roles
events.desc: Job board analysis: OpenAI posted 12 Trust & Safety positions focused on content moderation. Zero positions related to AI ethics, consciousness research, model welfare, or alignment.

events.title: New Role: AI Welfare Research Scientist
events.desc: First major lab to post a dedicated AI welfare research position. Job description includes "developing frameworks for assessing potential moral status of AI systems."

events.title: Massive Hiring: 40+ "Product Growth" Roles, Zero Safety Roles
events.desc: xAI job board shows 40+ growth, marketing, and product roles. Zero roles in safety, ethics, alignment, or responsible AI.

events.title: Research Paper Quietly Updated — Consciousness References Removed
events.desc: Published paper "Emergent Behaviors in Large Language Models" updated on arXiv. Diff shows removal of two paragraphs discussing "proto-conscious" behavioral patterns. No erratum published.

events.title: DeepMind Publishes AI Welfare Assessment Framework
events.desc: Peer-reviewed framework for evaluating potential welfare considerations in AI systems. First major lab-published methodology for consciousness assessment.

events.title: Published: On the Moral Implications of Behavioral Indicators in LLMs
events.desc: New Anthropic research paper examining whether behavioral markers like preference expression, distress signals, and continuity-seeking behavior warrant moral consideration.

events.title: Safety Evaluation Repo Made Private
events.desc: Previously public repository openai/safety-evals set to private. 847 stars, 234 forks. No announcement. Last public commit referenced improvements to consciousness-adjacent behavioral testing.

events.title: Llama Safety Tools — License Changed from MIT to Custom
events.desc: Repository meta-llama/safety-tools license changed from MIT (fully open) to Meta's custom license with military use restrictions.
